raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nahze Juhdite eeficha
n pafehdehs / un Olowernum
ippe tas Prahts ( ta Ka ) ais-
rahhts us winnu/ un winna
Sir̃ds lehze/ un winnam ilgo-
he fohti ar tahs kohpa tikt:
o winch lawejahs / ka winch
isdewiga Laika peewiltn / no
hs Deenas/ kad winch to bij
dsejs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Olowernum fazztja us
nnau: Dser nu/ un effi preeziga
ciume.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Juhdite afbildeja:
ann es dserichu / Kungs/ jo
iffu mannu Mubchu man ne
tahds leeis Gobds notizzis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ta ehde un dsehre
eekisch winna/ ko winnas Kal-
one bij patalfijfi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Olowernum preza-
hs pahr winnas/ un dsehre toh-
daufs Wihna / jik winch-
eena Deena dserk ue mehdse/
mehr winch dsimnis bija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": �,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta XIII. Nodalla
Ad nu Wakkars kina/
K tad steidsahs winna
Kalpt/un gahje nohst:
n Bagous afsfehdse to Telti
ahrenes/ kad winch atsahdi-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet Juhdite ween tappe
Telti pamesta/ un Olowernum/
kas jaw apgullees bija sawa
Gultā/ un bij Wihnu pahr-
dsehrees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Juhdite pawehleja fa-
wat Meitai / ka tai bij ahra
preekich winnas Rambata stah-
weht/un gaidtht/ kad winna iso-
eetu/ ittin ta / ka ikdeenas no-
tifke / jo ta fazztja/ ka winnat
bij ja-iseet pee sawas Deewa
Luhgschanas : Un ta bij winna
us Bagous runnajji.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiſſi bij nogahjuschti /
ka netweens tai Kambari palikte
net maſſ nei leefs: Un Juhdite
stahweja pee winna Gultas / un
fazztja tanā Sir̃di: Ak Kungs/
tu Deews wiſſa Spehka! us-
lukfo schinni Brihdi us mannu
Rohku Darbeem Jerusalenees
Pa-augstinachanas labbad.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo nu irr Laiks taiwu ee-
manotu Teefu pahrstahweht /
un mannat Aprneinschanai klaht-
stahweht/ ka fadausiti tohp tee
Eenaidneeki/ kas prett muuns tre
zehluschees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ta pegahje pre tahs
Gultas Stabba/ kas Olower-
nus Galwas Gallā bja / wa
norcheine to Sohbtina / kas pee
ta fahre.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un gabje tuwu pre Gultas
lahtu/
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
